roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:60 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2014,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT,PAROLE SUSPENDED ON 4-5-2013, PAROLE REINSTATED AS OF 9-3-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE ANDFOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
